name: What are YOU looking at huh!? || Anthro Rayquaza
description:
______________________________________________________________________
Disregard the text in the photo sauce, I'm doing a completely different thing than what it says there.

This is Quetzal, one of many Rayquaza gals out in the world! She's certainly a force to be reckoned with, but I can say for sure that if you slip up, you're a goner that will descend a plane of reality. So be careful with her & please please PLEAAAAASEEEE don't do anything really bad to her alright? (She doesn't want me to tell you this but she's pretty cute once you get to know her!) But yeah, have fun with her!
______________________________________________________________________

Did you guys know that Rayquaza was based off the Aztec God Quetzalcoatl, the Flying Serpent God? Yep! That's why Rayquaza has quite the serpentine frame. Oh well, I'm sure you avid Pokémon fans know that, but I just wanted to say out that fact to those who don't know. Besides, who doesn't like snake Pokémon anyway? I'm sure they mean no harm at allllllllll...right?

....

RIGHT??

Anyways, that's what I have folks! Same thing from the previous thing before, so choose who you want & comment down below!
______________________________
(1) Anthro Houndoom || (2) Anthro Absol || (3) Professor Blaziken
creator: Clystrestle_
